## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members on customer use cases, pricing models, and content strategies for growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pricing model based on words/month for editorial content, pages/year for programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Programmatic content strategy focuses on scalable, repeatable templates targeting high-variance keywords](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Content repurposing (e.g., from podcasts, webinars) is a valuable service offering and differentiator](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Early alignment on success metrics and attribution is crucial for demonstrating value to clients](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

## Topics

### Pricing and Production Models

  - [Editorial content priced by words/month (e.g., 1500 words/article, 7-15 pieces/week)](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Programmatic content priced by pages/year (e.g., 1200 base level at $12K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Need for improved tracking of production vs. commitments](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Opportunity to automate and streamline processes without over-complicating](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)

### Content Management and Planning

  - [Airtable used for organizing content by clusters, topics, and status](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Potential need for calendar view to improve planning](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Importance of taking a longer-term view on content strategy to align with client growth goals](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

### Programmatic Content Strategy

  - [Targets high-variance head terms (e.g., per diem allowances by location)](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Uses repeatable templates to scale content production efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Can generate significant traffic but requires creative thinking to match business needs](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Examples: Tray.io's integration pages, glossary pages for definitions](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

### Link Building and AI Outbound Campaigns

  - [Recent focus on internal link building among client base](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Exploring partnerships for quality backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [AI outbound campaigns currently paused due to logistical challenges](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

### Content Repurposing

  - [Opportunity to expand services by repurposing existing client content (e.g., webinars, podcasts, PDFs)](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Example: Creating articles from Galileo's podcast transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Helps showcase value and differentiation to clients](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)

### Measuring Success and Attribution

  - [Importance of understanding client attribution systems early in engagement](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [Need to educate clients on holistic impact of content (e.g., overall domain authority)](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Developing playbooks for navigating different client situations and metrics](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Improve tracking of content production vs. commitments](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Explore implementation of calendar view in Airtable for better planning](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Develop clearer playbooks for discussing success metrics and attribution with clients](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [Continue refining link building and content repurposing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Encourage new team members to share ideas for process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/47SH9JGrBTn_zsYQRNAoHhddV436SYhu?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
